title: Anatomy of an Ethereum Transaction
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of a transaction from initiation to finalization on the Ethereum blockchain, highlighting key components and their interactions.
relationships: User signs and broadcasts a transaction
Transaction is propagated to the network and picked up by a miner/validator
Miner executes the transaction code on the EVM
EVM interacts with and potentially updates the state of a Smart Contract
Miner bundles the valid transaction into a new block
New block, containing the transaction and a New State Root, is added to the Ethereum Blockchain
